text: Prof. John Mearsheimer on Trump's Hormuz blockade: It’s not only ineffective — it’s counterproductive. The idea that Iran will simply throw up its hands and surrender is not a serious argument. Why did we allow Iranian oil back into global markets? Because we needed it. We removed sanctions because without Iranian oil, the global economy could go off a cliff. If the Houthis and the Iranians shut down the Red Sea, you won’t just lose Persian Gulf oil — you’ll lose Red Sea trade as well. That would throttle the world economy. And that’s what could ultimately force the Trump administration to concede.
text_zh: 约翰·米尔斯海默教授谈特朗普对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁：这不仅无效，而且适得其反。认为伊朗会简单地举手投降并不是一个严肃的论点。我们当初为什么要允许伊朗石油重返全球市场？因为我们需要它。我们取消制裁是因为如果没有伊朗石油，全球经济可能会陷入崩溃。如果胡塞武装和伊朗封锁了红海，你不仅会失去波斯湾的石油，还会失去红海的贸易。那将扼杀世界经济。而这最终可能会迫使特朗普政府做出让步。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said Iran’s navy is “lying at the bottom of the sea, completely obliterated – 158 ships”. He warned that any remaining “fast attack ships” that come near the US blockade will be “immediately eliminated”. Trump also claimed that 98.2% of drugs coming into the US by sea have stopped. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普称伊朗海军“躺在海底，被彻底摧毁——158艘船”。他警告说，任何靠近美国封锁线的剩余“快速攻击舰”都将被“立即消灭”。特朗普还声称，通过海路进入美国的毒品中有98.2%已经停止。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 Trump says IRGC fast attack boats will be “eliminated” if they get anywhere near U.S. blockade." Trump announces victory over his own imagination again
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 特朗普称，如果伊斯兰革命卫队的快速攻击艇靠近美国封锁线，它们将被‘消灭’。” 特朗普再次宣布战胜了自己的想象力

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump says IRGC fast attack boats will be “eliminated” if they get anywhere near U.S. blockade.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普称，如果伊斯兰革命卫队的快速攻击艇靠近美国封锁线，它们将被“消灭”。

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇺🇸 Debris of an advanced US missile believed to have fallen in Swaida. A video showing what is believed to be a sensitive part of a missile belonging to the US THAAD missile defense system in southern Syria, specifically near Swaida. According to a report published, the video likely shows the missile's infrared seeker, one of its most sensitive components. The report indicated that the part appears relatively intact despite the interception or impact conditions. This type of technology is considered highly classified, and US authorities believe that if it falls into enemy hands, it could be used for reverse engineering and developing countermeasures. The US Department of Defense has not issued any official statement. Or confirmation regarding the implementation of a debris recovery operation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇺🇸 据信坠落在苏韦达的一枚先进美国导弹的残骸。一段视频显示了据信是美国萨德（THAAD）导弹防御系统导弹的一个敏感部件，地点在叙利亚南部，具体是在苏韦达附近。据一份报告显示，该视频可能展示了导弹的红外导引头，这是其最敏感的组件之一。报告指出，尽管经过拦截或撞击，该部件看起来相对完整。这种技术被认为是高度机密的，美国当局认为，如果它落入敌手，可能会被用于逆向工程和开发反制措施。美国国防部尚未就实施残骸回收行动发表任何官方声明或确认。@wfwitness

text: Trumps “blockade” of Iran has started
text_zh: 特朗普对伊朗的“封锁”已经开始

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 US President Donald Trump says Iran’s navy is “at the bottom of the sea, completely obliterated – 158 ships.” He warns that any remaining “fast attack ships” approaching a US blockade will be “immediately eliminated,” describing the response as “quick and brutal.” He adds that “98.2% of drugs coming into the US by ocean or sea have stopped,” linking the policy to maritime enforcement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普称伊朗海军“躺在海底，被彻底摧毁——158艘船”。他警告说，任何靠近美国封锁线的剩余“快速攻击舰”都将被“立即消灭”，并形容这种反应是“迅速而残酷的”。他补充说，“通过海洋或海路进入美国的毒品中有98.2%已经停止”，并将该政策与海上执法联系起来。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 "MY BLOCKADE IS BETTER THAN YOURS, POSSIBLY THE BEST EVER. THANK YOU FOR THE ATTENTION TO THIS MATTER" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 “我的封锁比你们的好，可能是史上最好的。感谢对此事的关注” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: Iran’s Navy is laying at the bottom of the sea, completely obliterated - 158 ships. What we have not hit are their small number of, what they call, “fast attack ships,” because we did not consider them much of a threat. Warning: If any of these ships come anywhere close to our BLOCKADE, they will be immediately ELIMINATED, using the same system of kill that we use against the drug dealers on boats at Sea. It is quick and brutal. P.S. 98.2% of Drugs coming into the U.S. by Ocean or Sea have STOPPED! Thank you for your attention to this matter.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗海军躺在海底，被彻底摧毁——158艘船。我们没有打击的是他们为数不多的所谓“快速攻击舰”，因为我们认为它们构不成什么威胁。警告：如果这些船只中的任何一艘靠近我们的封锁线，它们将立即被消灭，使用我们打击海上毒贩的同一套杀伤系统。这是迅速而残酷的。附：通过海洋或海路进入美国的毒品中有98.2%已经停止！感谢对此事的关注。

text: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ War Criminal Bibi: "He (JD Vance) briefed me in detail, as members of this administration do every day, on the progress of the negotiations."
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 战犯比比：“他（JD·万斯）向我详细通报了谈判进展，正如本届政府成员每天所做的那样。”

text: China denies reports that it is sending or planning to send weapons to Iran: We oppose groundless smears or malicious associations without any factual basis.
text_zh: 中国否认有关其正在或计划向伊朗运送武器的报道：我们反对任何没有事实依据的无端抹黑或恶意联想。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework has resumed intensive meetings to name a prime minister candidate. The first gathering is at Ammar al‑Hakim’s house. Out of 12 leaders, eight must sign the official letter to the president for the candidate to be commissioned.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Kurdistan24 : Iraq’s Shiite religious authority, the Marja’iyya, has reportedly placed a veto on a second term for caretaker Iraqi Prime Minister Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani, a senior Coordination Framework leader said. An “external veto” is also in place. Sudani’s chances are “very low”. Three main candidates are being considered: former prime minister Haider al‑Abadi, Bassem al‑Badri and Hamid al‑Shatri. Nouri al‑Maliki’s prospects are fading, and he may propose an independent candidate. U.S. President Trump has warned that Washington could withdraw support if Maliki returns to office. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 伊拉克的什叶派协调框架已恢复密集会议，以提名总理候选人。第一次聚会在阿马尔·哈基姆的家中举行。在12位领导人中，必须有8位在正式致总统的信函上签字，候选人才能获得任命……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Kurdistan24：据一位协调框架高级领导人称，伊拉克什叶派宗教权威大阿亚图拉已否决了看守总理穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼连任。目前还存在“外部否决”。苏达尼的机会“非常渺茫”。目前正在考虑三位主要候选人：前总理海德尔·阿巴迪、巴塞姆·巴德里和哈米德·沙特里。努里·马利基的前景正在暗淡，他可能会提议一位独立候选人。美国总统特朗普警告说，如果马利基重返办公室，华盛顿可能会撤回支持。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Golan region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部戈兰地区响起无人机警报。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF reports two soldiers were moderately injured and six others lightly wounded after an explosive drone struck the area where they were operating in southern Lebanon earlier this Monday. All of the injured were evacuated to hospital for medical treatment, and their families have been notified. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军报告称，本周一早些时候，一架爆炸性无人机袭击了他们在黎巴嫩南部活动的区域，造成两名士兵中度受伤，另有六人轻伤。所有伤者已被送往医院接受治疗，他们的家人已收到通知。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed: Iraq’s political scene has shifted to a new crisis over the premiership after the election of President Nizar Amidi. The Coordination Framework is deeply divided, with growing momentum to exclude its current nominee Nouri al‑Maliki.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework has resumed intensive meetings to name a prime minister candidate. The first gathering is at Ammar al‑Hakim’s house. Out of 12 leaders, eight must sign the official letter to the president for the candidate to be commissioned. The constitution allows 14 days to avoid a political vacuum. Any candidate who secures two‑thirds of the framework’s votes will be their nominee. Nouri al‑Maliki has not yet withdrawn; he may condition his withdrawal on a candidate close to him. Other names include Haider al‑Abadi, Bassem al‑Badri, Mohsen al‑Mandlawi, Hamid al‑Shatri, Qasim al‑Araji, Ali Shukri and Muhammad Sahib al‑Daraji. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 阿拉伯人报：在尼扎尔·阿米迪当选总统后，伊拉克的政治局势因总理职位陷入了新的危机。协调框架内部分歧严重，排除其现任提名人努里·马利基的势头日益高涨……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克的什叶派协调框架已恢复密集会议，以提名总理候选人。第一次聚会在阿马尔·哈基姆的家中举行。在12位领导人中，必须有8位在正式致总统的信函上签字，候选人才能获得任命。宪法允许14天的时间以避免政治真空。任何获得协调框架三分之二选票的候选人将成为他们的提名人。努里·马利基尚未退出；他可能会以一位与他亲近的候选人为条件来换取退出。其他名字包括海德尔·阿巴迪、巴塞姆·巴德里、穆赫辛·曼德拉维、哈米德·沙特里、卡西姆·阿拉吉、阿里·舒克里和穆罕默德·萨希布·达拉吉。@wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 Russia is a security risk - Magyar 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 俄罗斯是一个安全风险 - 马扎尔 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar: We see that JD Vance stated, when he was here, that they will work with the next Hungarian government in the same way, regardless of whether it is led by Viktor Orbán or the opposition, whom they did not know at the time; I hope we will get to know each other.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：我们看到JD·万斯在访问这里时表示，他们将以同样的方式与下一届匈牙利政府合作，无论是由维克多·欧尔班领导，还是由当时他们还不认识的反对派领导；我希望我们能互相了解。

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Israeli Channel 12 : A Saudi royal family source said there is no solution to the Iran threat without a U.S. ground invasion and regime change, similar to the 2003 fall of Saddam Hussein. The source stressed that any alternative must be secular and acceptable to the Iranian public, preferably not Crown Prince Reza Pahlavi. Saudi Arabia believes the war has not achieved its results and that Iran has become more aggressive towards the kingdom, Israel and the U.S. However, Riyadh does not see itself as a direct party to the conflict. “If we are exposed to Iranian aggression, each incident will have its own response,” the source said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 以色列第12频道：一位沙特王室消息人士称，如果没有美国的地面入侵和政权更迭，类似于2003年萨达姆·侯赛因的倒台，伊朗威胁就没有解决办法。该消息人士强调，任何替代方案都必须是世俗的，并能被伊朗公众所接受，最好不是礼萨·巴列维王储。沙特阿拉伯认为战争没有达到预期结果，伊朗对沙特、以色列和美国的态度变得更加激进。然而，利雅得并不认为自己是冲突的直接参与方。“如果我们受到伊朗的侵略，每一件事都会有相应的回应，”该消息人士说。@wfwitness

text: Péter Magyar: Russia is a security risk — and everyone knows it. I am not speaking about the Russian people — they are fantastic people — but about the Russian state. In Hungarian history, we have felt the Russian bear before. Europe must prepare. Europe must protect and defend itself.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：俄罗斯是一个安全风险——每个人都知道这一点。我说的不是俄罗斯人民——他们是了不起的人民——而是俄罗斯国家。在匈牙利历史上，我们以前感受过俄罗斯熊的力量。欧洲必须做好准备。欧洲必须保护和捍卫自己。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: A senior fellow at the Foundation for Defence of Democracies estimates that the U.S. naval blockade on the Strait of Hormuz will cost Iran approximately $276 million per day in lost exports and $159 million per day in imports – a combined daily loss of $435 million, or $13 billion per month. Over 90% of Iran’s annual trade, worth $109.7 billion, passes through the Gulf. Iran exported 1.5 million barrels of oil per day before the blockade, earning $139 million daily. Petrochemical exports of $19.7 billion over nine months (about $54 million/day) are also at risk. More than 90% of Iran’s maritime trade transits the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：保卫民主基金会的一位高级研究员估计，美国对霍尔木兹海峡的海军封锁将使伊朗每天损失约2.76亿美元的出口和1.59亿美元的进口——每天总损失4.35亿美元，或每月130亿美元。伊朗90%以上的年度贸易额（价值1097亿美元）通过海湾地区。封锁前，伊朗每天出口150万桶石油，每天收入1.39亿美元。九个月内197亿美元的石化产品出口（约每天5400万美元）也面临风险。伊朗90%以上的海上贸易通过霍尔木兹海峡。@wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 🇺🇸 Péter Magyar: I will not call Trump. But if he, or anyone from the U.S. administration, reaches out to us, we will be available. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 🇺🇸 彼得·马扎尔：我不会给特朗普打电话。但如果他或美国政府的任何人联系我们，我们将随时待命。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarTranslated World media have lined up for the first press conference of Péter Magyar, leader of the "Tisza" party, following his victory in Hungary's parliamentary elections. Everyone is waiting for the first statements from the politician who brought an end to Orbán's 16-year rule. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043691424013529112/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 战争翻译 世界媒体排队参加“蒂萨”党领导人彼得·马扎尔在匈牙利议会选举获胜后的首次新闻发布会。每个人都在等待这位终结了欧尔班16年统治的政治家的首次声明。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043691424013529112/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. IRANIAN NAVAL BLOCKADE HAS BEGUN 🔴 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国对伊朗的海军封锁已经开始 🔴 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 "The blockade will be enforced impartially against vessels of all nations entering or departing Iranian ports and coastal areas, including all Iranian ports on the Arabian Gulf and Gulf of Oman. CENTCOM forces will not impede freedom of navigation for vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz to and from non-Iranian ports." - U.S. Central Command. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 “封锁将公正地针对所有进入或离开伊朗港口和沿海地区的国家的船只，包括所有在阿拉伯湾和阿曼湾的伊朗港口。中央司令部部队不会阻碍通过霍尔木兹海峡往返非伊朗港口的船只的航行自由。” - 美国中央司令部。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel ITS 10 AM 10 AM IS IN TWO HOURS. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 现在是上午10点，上午10点还有两个小时。 - 开源情报推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The UKMTO announced that new maritime restrictions on access to Iranian ports and coastal areas took effect at 14:00 UTC. ➡️ The measures apply to vessels of all flags operating with Iranian ports, oil terminals, and coastal facilities across the Arabian Gulf, Gulf of Oman, and the Arabian Sea east of the Strait of Hormuz. ➡️ The restrictions cover the entire Iranian coastline, though neutral ships already in port have been given a "limited grace period" to leave. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 英国海上贸易行动办公室宣布，针对进入伊朗港口和沿海地区的新海上限制措施已于UTC时间14:00生效。➡️ 这些措施适用于所有在阿拉伯湾、阿曼湾和霍尔木兹海峡以东的阿拉伯海与伊朗港口、石油码头和沿海设施进行作业的悬挂任何旗帜的船只。➡️ 限制覆盖了整个伊朗海岸线，尽管已经在港口的外国船只获得了“有限的宽限期”以离开。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran military spokesman: If the U.S. imposes a blockade, Iran says it will decisively implement a “permanent mechanism” to control the Strait of Hormuz. Iran military spokesman: “U.S. restrictions on vessels in international waters is illegal” You can’t make this up. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043689542977278158/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗军方发言人：如果美国实施封锁，伊朗表示将果断实施“永久机制”来控制霍尔木兹海峡。伊朗军方发言人：“美国对国际水域船只的限制是非法的”。你无法编造这些。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043689542977278158/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Péter Magyar says he wants to bring back EU funding to improve Hungary's economy but doesn't support Ukraine's "fast-track accession to the EU" and that "Hungary should opt out" of the 90B loan to Ukraine as "Hungary is in a very difficult financial situation." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043690092284284935/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 彼得·马扎尔表示，他希望带回欧盟资金以改善匈牙利经济，但不支持乌克兰“快速加入欧盟”，并表示“匈牙利应该选择退出”对乌克兰的900亿贷款，因为“匈牙利处于非常困难的财政状况”。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043690092284284935/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A Saudi Royal Court source says the Kingdom does not see itself as a direct party to the conflict. "This is not our war. If we are exposed to Iranian aggression, each event will have its own response. But as of now, we have not made a decision to enter this war." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043689721197408422/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 一位沙特王室消息人士称，沙特王国不认为自己是冲突的直接参与方。“这不是我们的战争。如果我们受到伊朗的侵略，每一件事都会有相应的回应。但截至目前，我们还没有做出参加这场战争的决定。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043689721197408422/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran military spokesman: “U.S. restrictions on vessels in international waters is illegal” You can’t make this up. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043689542977278158/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗军方发言人：“美国对国际水域船只的限制是非法的”。你无法编造这些。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043689542977278158/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 New York Post: Iranian officials are weighing whether to give up uranium enrichment as a U.S. condition to end the war. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 最新 🔴 纽约邮报：伊朗官员正在权衡是否放弃铀浓缩作为美国结束战争的条件。推文

text: Visioner 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 TISZA's Péter Magyar: We do not support Ukraine's accelerated accession to the EU. On one hand, we are talking about a country at war; it is absolutely absurd for a country at war to be admitted to the European Union. You can't even have real negotiations with all the accession chapters, so I don't think it's relevant at the moment. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 蒂萨党的彼得·马扎尔：我们不支持乌克兰加速加入欧盟。一方面，我们谈论的是一个处于战争状态的国家；让一个处于战争状态的国家加入欧盟是绝对荒谬的。你甚至无法就所有加入章节进行真正的谈判，所以我认为目前这并不相关。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hungary's incoming PM Peter Magyar: His government will reverse Viktor Orban's decision to withdraw from the ICC. EU decisions on Israel will continue to be blocked but investigated case by case. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043688993917702384/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔：他的政府将撤销维克多·欧尔班退出国际刑事法院的决定。欧盟关于以色列的决定将继续被阻止，但会逐案调查。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043688993917702384/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hungary election winner Magyar: “We need good relations with the U.S.” Hungary election winner Magyar: “The U.S. is a very important partner.” Hungary election winner Magyar: “I will not call Trump.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043688841618358518/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 匈牙利选举获胜者马扎尔：“我们需要与美国建立良好的关系。” 匈牙利选举获胜者马扎尔：“美国是一个非常重要的伙伴。” 匈牙利选举获胜者马扎尔：“我不会给特朗普打电话。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043688841618358518/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Spanish judge has charged Spains PM Sanchez’s wife with: • Tráfico de influencias (influence peddling) • Corrupción en los negocios (corruption in the private sector/business corruption) • Malversación de caudales públicos (embezzlement/misappropriation of public funds) • Apropiación indebida (misappropriation) NEW 🔴 The wife of Spain’s Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez has been formally charged with influence peddling and corruption. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043682489399443718/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 西班牙法官已指控西班牙首相桑切斯的妻子：• 影响力交易 • 商业腐败（私营部门腐败） • 挪用公款 • 不当挪用 最新 🔴 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯的妻子已被正式指控犯有影响力交易和腐败罪。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043682489399443718/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Hungary’s incoming prime minister, Peter Magyar, his government will look to reverse Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s decision to withdraw from the International Criminal Court (ICC). Additionally, on the Hungary-Israel relationship, Magyar said that EU decisions on Israel will continue to be blocked, but will be investigated on a case-by-case basis. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔称，他的政府将寻求撤销总理维克多·欧尔班退出国际刑事法院（ICC）的决定。此外，关于匈牙利与以色列的关系，马扎尔表示，欧盟关于以色列的决定将继续被阻止，但将逐案进行调查。推文

text: Open Source Intel Over 250 Hezbollah terrorists eliminated in wave of strikes in Lebanon on April 8, including dozens in Beirut. They were all eliminated within 10 minutes tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 4月8日在黎巴嫩的一波袭击中，超过250名真主党恐怖分子被消灭，其中包括在贝鲁特的数十人。他们都在10分钟内被消灭 推文

text: Open Source Intel 10 AM IS IN 13 MINUTES 10 AM IS IN TWO HOURS. - Open Source Intel tweet

text: Péter Magyar: I will not call Trump. But if he, or anyone from the U.S. administration, reaches out to us, we will be available.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：我不会给特朗普打电话。但如果他或美国政府的任何人联系我们，我们将随时待命。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The USS George H.W. Bush has crossed the Strait of Gibraltar enroute to the Middle East. @wfwitness

text: Trump's deadline is over. The U.S. blockade of Iran begins.
text_zh: 特朗普的最后期限已过。美国对伊朗的封锁开始了。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the United States Navy will immediately begin blockading any ships trying to enter or leave the Strait of Hormuz. He said the talks with Iran went well and most points were agreed, but the nuclear issue was…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is now in effect after U.S. President Trump’s 10am deadline has passed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普宣布，美国海军将立即开始封锁任何试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只。他说与伊朗的会谈进展顺利，大多数要点已达成一致，但核问题……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 在美国总统特朗普的上午10点最后期限过后，对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁现已生效。@wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 Magyar stated that he would like to discuss with Putin the terms and cost of Hungary's and Russia's current energy agreements He hopes that the EU will lift sanctions against Russia after the conflict in Ukraine ends. Hungary will do everything to diversify energy supplies but this does not mean refusing to supply from Russia, he stated 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 马扎尔表示，他希望与普京讨论匈牙利和俄罗斯当前能源协议的条款和成本。他希望欧盟在乌克兰冲突结束后取消对俄罗斯的制裁。他表示，匈牙利将尽一切努力实现能源供应多元化，但这并不意味着拒绝俄罗斯的供应 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar: Ukraine is the victim of this war. Everyone knows that. No one should tell Ukraine under what conditions it must enter peace or sign a peace treaty. We cannot ask any country to give up its territory. If they do, they would be considered traitors.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：乌克兰是这场战争的受害者。每个人都知道这一点。没有人应该告诉乌克兰在什么条件下必须进入和平或签署和平条约。我们不能要求任何国家放弃其领土。如果他们这样做，他们将被视为叛徒。

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 Russia is ready to build relations with the new Hungarian government but everything depends on its understanding of national interests, Lavrov stated. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 拉夫罗夫表示，俄罗斯准备与新一届匈牙利政府建立关系，但一切都取决于其对国家利益的理解。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇭🇺 Péter Magyar calls for Hungary's President to resign saying that he didn't say a word when thousands of Hungarian children were abused by pedophiles 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 Magyar agrees with Hungary's refusal to provide Ukraine with an EU loan of €90 billion However - "No one should tell Ukrainians on what terms the war needs to end" He stated that he does not support the accelerated accession of Ukraine to the EU, emphasizing the need for an equal approach to all candidate countries. According to him, the issue of Ukraine's membership could be put to a referendum, but this is not expected to happen in the next ten years. At the same time, he noted that the restoration of the rights of the ethnic Hungarian minority will be a key condition for the normalization of relations with Ukraine. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇭🇺 彼得·马扎尔呼吁匈牙利总统辞职，称当数千名匈牙利儿童受到恋童癖者虐待时，他一言不发 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 马扎尔同意匈牙利拒绝向乌克兰提供900亿欧元欧盟贷款。然而——“没有人应该告诉乌克兰人战争需要在什么条件下结束”。他表示不支持乌克兰加速加入欧盟，强调需要对所有候选国采取平等的方法。据他称，乌克兰的成员资格问题可以进行全民公投，但这预计不会在未来十年内发生。同时，他指出，恢复匈牙利少数民族的权利将是关系正常化的关键条件。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
